sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal fixed fraction (f) derived from Kelly formula: f = ((B+1)*P-1)/B or f = (P-Q)/B. Requires historical win/loss statistics (P=win probability, Q=loss probability, B=win/loss ratio). Apply geometric mean method for varying win/loss amounts. User must calculate optimal f from their trade data and apply as position sizing multiplier.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by calculating the optimal fixed fraction (f) using the Kelly formula, which accounts for win probability, loss probability, and the ratio of average wins to average losses.
